targets.name: Claude Code
targets.contextAttachSyntax: Reference the file using `@` followed by the file path.
targets.newChatGuidance: Open a new terminal and start Claude Code

taskDispatchGuidance.batchNote: For batches, the prompt contains a batch envelope with multiple Task Prompts.
taskDispatchGuidance.parallelNote: For parallel dispatch, multiple calls in a single message run concurrently.
